typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Extension mission projection sorts by local status priority before updatedAt, which diverges from daemon canonical ordering (updatedAt DESC, missionID ASC tie-break) and breaks deterministic cross-surface parity expectations.

Extension mission lifecycle enums cannot represent daemon lifecycle values (awaiting_approval, approved, dispatching, in_progress, partially_completed, failed, cancelled), preventing contract-level mission lifecycle parity.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update governance-worker handoff/verification procedure to require evidence for every listed feature verification step and all fulfilled validation-contract surfaces before completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed m4 feature handoff recorded only app/projection unit checks while the feature and validation contract required daemon mission-control coverage and extension host/parity checks (VAL-EXT-008, VAL-CROSS-010).
